scripts.db:init: docker exec -i cfms-mysql mysql -u cfms_user -pcfms_password cfms < database/schema.sql && docker exec -i cfms-mysql mysql -u cfms_user -pcfms_password cfms < database/triggers.sql && docker exec -i cfms-mysql mysql -u cfms_user -pcfms_password cfms < database/procedures.sql
scripts.db:seed: docker exec -i cfms-mysql mysql -u cfms_user -pcfms_password cfms < database/seed.sql
scripts.setup: npm run docker:up && npm run db:wait && npm run db:init && npm run db:seed
